CustomField.description: Formula: SOQL rows consumed by this operation.
CustomField.formula: IF( AND(NOT(ISBLANK(LimitsSoqlRowsAtEnd__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(LimitsSoqlRowsAtStart__c))), LimitsSoqlRowsAtEnd__c - LimitsSoqlRowsAtStart__c, NULL )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Formula: SOQL rows consumed by this operation.
CustomField.label: SOQL Rows Consumed
